name: suitemate-v3
description: SuiteMate V3 NetSuite UI and developer tools

scripts.test: npm run build && node --check src/shared/settings.js && node --check src/runtime/theme-runtime.js && node --check src/runtime/notification-runtime.js && node --check src/record-actions/core.js && node --check src/record-actions/csv-import.js && node --check src/import-assistant/core.js && node --check src/import-assistant/context-runtime.js && node --check src/palette/material-palette.js && node --check src/suiteql/core.js && node --check src/background/service-worker.js && node --check src/popup/popup.js && node --check tests/fixtures/chrome-stub.js && node --test tests/settings.test.mjs && node tests/verify.mjs
